sections.heading: Custom CNC Turning Services & Parts – China CNC Turned Components OEM Manufacturer & Company
sections.text: Custom CNC Turning Services & Parts – China CNC Turned Components OEM Manufacturer & Company Junying is an experienced Chinese precision CNC turning service provider, manufacturer, and exporter that specializes in offering the finest OEM CNC lathe machine services. Junying holds different advanced CNC turning lathes & machines that can process washers, bolts, shafts, rivets, gaskets, sleeves, threaded joints, stainless steel fittings, pipe fittings, lights, wheel bolts, and so on. Stainless steel, carbon steel, aluminum, copper, brass, and titanium are among the materials that our modern CNC turning center can process. We can always pick the best precision turning procedure to fit your requ...

sections.heading: CNC Turning Materials at Junying – Materials Used for CNC Turning Services
sections.text: CNC Turning Materials at Junying – Materials Used for CNC Turning Services We have more than 10 years of experience and have professional engineers and experienced staff to complete CNC turning services for various materials (metal, plastic, and wood). Different lathes are set up in our workshops for turning metal and wood. According to the types of machined part materials, certain maintenance and safety precautions may be required for the lathe. Here are some common materials for CNC turning manufacturers below. If the material you required is not listed in the table, please contact us. sections.heading: Why Choose Junying Lathe Machining Services
sections.text: Why Choose Junying Lathe Machining Services We have a variety of CNC manufacturing capabilities to meet various needs. In addition to turning, we also focus on milling, lathe, drilling, CNC turning and milling services , so you can get a large selection of CNC machining parts from our trusted team. We have a complete set of state-of-the-art turning equipment and quality control systems in the CNC shop, to deliver durable lathe turning parts and custom CNC parts with cheap prices. Our technicians are experts in the field of lathing parts, have rich experience providing customer service in precision CNC machining to a wide range of industries, both domestically and internationally.
